channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Trump's crypto token buyers are down $3.8 billion, blockchain data shows
item.description: The TRUMP token is down 96% from its peak, and 85% of secondary market wallets for WLFI are underwater, reflecting a broader downturn in the sector....

item.title: Unpatched Flaws Disclosed in Filesystem Bundled Into Millions of Embedded Devices

The flaws m...

item.title: New "Bad Epoll" Linux Kernel Flaw Lets Unprivileged Users Gain Root, Hits Android
item.description: A newly disclosed Linux kernel flaw called Bad Epoll (CVE-2026-46242) lets an ordinary user with no special access take full control of a machine as root. It affects Linux desktops, servers, and Andro...

item.title: FortiBleed credential-theft campaign linked to Lynx ransomware
item.description: The massive FortiBleed credential theft campaign has been linked to the INC and Lynx ransomware operations, suggesting the stolen Fortinet credentials were intended to fuel future network intrusions. ...

item.title: Kubota says hackers had month-long access to network systems
item.description: Kubota North America Corporation disclosed that hackers had access to some of its network systems for more than a month earlier this year. [...]...

item.title: Crafty Phishing Campaigns Auto-Adapt to Victim's Device, OS
item.description: Attackers fingerprint victims through user-agent data to deliver OS-specific payloads, increasing compromise rates and campaign profitability....

item.title: Unpatched Argo CD Repo-Server Flaw Could Let Attackers Take Over Kubernetes Clusters
item.description: Argo CD, a widely used tool for deploying software to Kubernetes, has an unpatched flaw in its repo-server component that lets an unauthenticated attacker run code, provided they can reach the compone...

item.title: 19-Year-Old Scattered Spider Suspect Extradited to Face U.S. Hacking Charges
item.description: A teenager accused of belonging to the hacking group Scattered Spider has been extradited from Finland to face U.S. charges of conspiracy, computer intrusion, and fraud, the U.S. Department of Justice...

item.title: SEO-Poisoned Software Sites Abuse ScreenConnect to Deploy AsyncRAT
item.description:
Unknown threat actors are leveraging the ScreenConnect remote access tool as a way to deploy and execute AsyncRAT.
Kaspersky said the activity is part of a "massive, multi-domain, multi-language" cam...

item.title: When Too Much Security Data Became the Risk
item.description: Rapid growth turned routine firewall logs into a security and budget liability. One CISO used artificial intelligence to filter what data truly belongs in the SIEM....
